summary: 将 .pm workflow-report 接入当前工程工作流
建立记忆启发式自我进化补强专题
补充 .codex 会话分析与 task-scoped working_memory 口径
Moltbook comment replies require parent_id, and failed verification can linger behind duplicate-content cache even after delete
Remaining Moltbook follower and DM notifications need separate liveops follow-up after comment triage
workflow-report close 的 working_memory 提示必须按当前 task 计数；零条目时先暴露 codex-working-memory bootstrap，而不是误用角色全局条目。
历史口径：commit 前曾要求通过 `./scripts/pm/codex-review-snapshot.sh` 在临时隔离快照中执行 `codex exec review --uncommitted`；该要求现已被 MEM-SHARED-0004 supersede，默认评审边界改为 GitHub PR review。
P2PARCH-6 full-tier still relies on proxy longrun drills; dedicated sentry/NAT lab remains unresolved
shared-devnet blocker packet still lacks mixed-topology draft evidence scaffold
P2P deployment UX should collapse to 2-3 auto-selected user modes while preserving internal role semantics
software_safe candidate still times out on Step x1 with no progress, breaking the minimum world-control closure despite prompt/chat success
agent direct connect review needs formal gap doc and remediation plan
Resolve remaining live reachability follow-up risks in recommender/status contract
headless_agent dual-mode recertification still observed one recoverable provider_unreachable before successful completion
Builtin LLM live gameplay should default to a 10s interactive timeout so software_safe step returns blocked ack instead of hanging on 180s provider waits
P2PARCH-6 latest full proxy matrix executes end-to-end but still fails on consensus_hash_divergence, committed_height_not_monotonic, known_peer_heads_zero_samples, and http_failure_samples.
Triad explicit-bootstrap replication peer set can still drop to zero under soak, leaving sequencer fetch-blob and observer/storage fetch-commit with no connected peers despite provider-aware routing

Private observer triad needed reverse UDP gossip seeding, mixed-root signer overrides, and replication requester allowlist to recover known_peer_heads and network_committed_height in the real three-node environment
Shared-devnet triad now runs a unified 89860f6eb6d5 runtime, but observer_local still stays known_peer_heads=0 and network_committed_height=0 after upgrade
P2PARCH-6 real env triad remains partial: observer_local stays known_peer_heads=0 and network_committed_height=0 while cloud pair stays live
software_safe primary Web entry contract passes, but formal gameplay remains blocked because QA runtime lacks OASIS7_LLM_MODEL/provider config; release claim must stay gated until LLM-enabled rerun
Current real-env observer no longer reproduces peer-head-zero; blocker has shifted to gap-sync blob-not-found and same-window triad reconfirmation still needs remote auth

Same-window triad reconfirmation now isolates real-env blocker to sequencer execution stale-height while observer/storage stay live; triad snapshot signatures were tightened to committed-height-zero semantics

OpenAI-compatible Responses providers may require list-shaped input, streaming create_stream, and output_item.done aggregation because response.completed.output can be empty even when function calls succeeded
Fresh ECS rollout cleared sequencer stale-height, but real-env triad is now blocked by storage challenge gate network threshold unmet while observer remains stuck on gap-sync blob-not-found
PRD-GAME-012 formal software_safe lane still blocks on first step because Responses API times out after 10s; keep retention gate hold until control floor is restored
Real-main-config software_safe rerun restored first-step progress; retention gate moves from hold to watch pending 3 active-LLM samples
required/pre-commit 已把 builtin wasm-heavy runtime 闭环下放到 test_tier_full，required 复跑不再触发 builtin wasm 物料化日志。

TASK-GAME-065 formal retention gate stays hold after three 10-minute active-LLM samples: one stalls at post_onboarding.establish_first_capability 20 percent and two regress to first_session_loop with frozen logicalTime/eventSeq
当前链上代币正式产品名已冻结为绿洲币 / Oasis Coin；AWT 仍仅表示 runtime symbol/ticker，若要改 symbol 必须另开专题评审
Reward claimant user-facing identity should use Oasis ID; raw public key stays in signer/account-binding topics.

Runtime-live gameplay snapshot must ignore bootstrap ticks when deciding first_session_loop exit; use a bootstrap time baseline so blocked/no-progress feedback after real progress stays post_onboarding without regressing fresh LLM sessions.
Runtime-live background play should tolerate a small number of transient LLM/provider failures after prior world progress instead of permanently stopping on the first error
Active-LLM post_onboarding 20 percent stall traced to smelter-first industrial schema drift plus coverage handoff regressions.

S10 release-gate soak requires explicit replication listen/peer topology; sequencer bootstrap fetch-commit protocol-unavailable is tolerable only as a tightly bounded warning (<=2 samples) in the canonical five-node soak gate.
Peer record direct_addrs must publish dialable reachability truth and republish on external-address changes
GitHub PR review now replaces local codex-review-snapshot as the default workflow review boundary; workflow close points to prepare-task-pr and the local snapshot review script is removed.

Post-onboarding capability truth must follow the current primary factory chain, and industry stage must recompute from active factory completions instead of monotonic historical completed_recipe_jobs.
Cached peer record fallback must avoid target-self proxying and surface cache miss as ErrNotFound so discovery can retry another connected proxy.
Launcher public upgrade path remains manual replace only; relative config/world state requires user backup before reinstall or overwrite
Wasm determinism gate now plans changed paths first and keeps verify-wasm-determinism contexts stable while unrelated PRs no-op

Viewer perf verification confirmed industry-graph zoom/read and agent activity summary as real hotspots with measured wins, while runtime module subscription routing reproduced only as a partial synthetic cost and should wait for finer-grained profiling before invasive caching.
Active-LLM trust gate rerun regressed to step accepted but queued forever with no logicalTime/eventSeq advance
Task worktree creation should support atomic .pm bootstrap in the target worktree so source worktrees do not get polluted by task files or workflow timestamps.
Rust required gate now plans changed paths first, keeps required-gate context stable, and downgrades docs-only or metadata-only PRs to governance/fmt-only.
WASM executor disk cache must persist serialized compiled artifacts, not raw wasm bytes, or restart hits still pay Module::new compile cost

gameplay_submit_api_tests shared a static action-id allocator and nonce tracker, so default cargo test parallelism made gameplay_submit gate assertions race; serialize the suite or remove shared mutable globals before using it as a stable gate.
Release Packages Windows package-native can fail before packaging when a tracked path is invalid on Windows; gate tracked-path compatibility in required checks.

release-gate-web had stale software_safe semantics: play was required to advance immediately and the gate wrongly required selectedKind=agent; release QA must instead accept queued live controls and require later step completed_advanced plus positive world delta

Release Packages build-web-dist regressed because launcher_core gated cross-target URL helpers behind native-only cfg; wasm32 build then lost parse_http_base_url, normalize_host_for_url, and host_for_url even though launcher_core_http still defined them
WASM status percentile derivation must treat le_* buckets as cumulative thresholds instead of summing each bucket as a histogram
Rust required gate now adds launcher Web trunk build on demand for launcher/shared-runtime path hits, keeping stable required-gate context while avoiding release-only wasm regressions.

Chain status consensus health should expose commit freshness, pending proposal progress, queue pressure, and inbound timing rejects as bounded machine-readable fields; further operator timing analysis should stay in repo-owned summaries instead of high-cardinality status payloads.

Real-env triad now has a canonical observability wrapper that merges snapshot, host/process, traffic, and wasm summaries; snapshot local env readability, host NDJSON formatting, and wasm bash-invocation were fixed as live-run blockers.
